steps.title: Find the shared input
steps.content:
The slope of $p$ is $7$, and $p(5)=38$. Since $p(c)=-11$, use the slope between the points $(c,-11)$ and $(5,38)$:
$$
\frac{38-(-11)}{5-c}=7
$$
$$
\frac{49}{5-c}=7
$$
$$
5-c=7
$$
$$
c=-2
$$

steps.title: Use the two values of t
steps.content: For function $t$, the two points are $(-2,-8)$ and $(4,52)$. Its slope is $$ \frac{52-(-8)}{4-(-2)}=\frac{60}{6}=10 $$ The answer is D.
